message:
fix: harden origin validation and persist pinned ref in wizard

- Refactor is_expected_acfs_origin_url() to normalize and case-fold
  URLs instead of relying on fragile regex matching
- Add origin-remote security check to update_acfs_self() for non-bootstrap
  runs, preventing self-update from unexpected remotes
- Persist pinned ACFS_REF via useACFSRef hook so the wizard remembers
  the user's chosen ref across page navigations
- Show loading placeholder while install mode hydrates to avoid flicker
- Point "view source" links at the effective ref instead of hardcoded main
- Update internal checksum for scripts/lib/update.sh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -103,9 +103,30 @@ ensure_path() {
 
 is_expected_acfs_origin_url() {
     local url="$1"
-    [[ "$url" =~ ^https://github\.com/${ACFS_REPO_OWNER}/${ACFS_REPO_NAME}(\.git)?$ ]] || \
-    [[ "$url" =~ ^git@github\.com:${ACFS_REPO_OWNER}/${ACFS_REPO_NAME}(\.git)?$ ]] || \
-    [[ "$url" =~ ^ssh://git@github\.com/${ACFS_REPO_OWNER}/${ACFS_REPO_NAME}(\.git)?$ ]]
+    local normalized="$url"
+    normalized="${normalized%/}"
+
+    case "$normalized" in
+        https://github.com/*)
+            normalized="${normalized#https://github.com/}"
+            ;;
+        git@github.com:*)
+            normalized="${normalized#git@github.com:}"
+            ;;
+        ssh://git@github.com/*)
+            normalized="${normalized#ssh://git@github.com/}"
+            ;;
+        *)
+            return 1
+            ;;
+    esac
+
+    normalized="${normalized%.git}"
+    normalized="${normalized,,}"
+
+    local expected="${ACFS_REPO_OWNER}/${ACFS_REPO_NAME}"
+    expected="${expected,,}"
+    [[ "$normalized" == "$expected" ]]
 }
 
 # ============================================================
@@ -824,6 +845,20 @@ update_acfs_self() {
         return 0
     fi
 
+    # Security: verify we are pulling from the expected ACFS origin.
+    # Do this for normal runs too (not only bootstrap mode) to prevent
+    # accidental or malicious self-update from an unexpected remote.
+    local origin_url
+    origin_url=$(git -C "$ACFS_REPO_ROOT" remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || true)
+    if [[ -z "$origin_url" ]]; then
+        log_item "warn" "ACFS self-update" "origin remote not configured"
+        return 0
+    fi
+    if ! is_expected_acfs_origin_url "$origin_url"; then
+        log_item "warn" "ACFS self-update" "unexpected origin remote: $origin_url"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
     # Get current branch
     local current_branch
     current_branch=$(git -C "$ACFS_REPO_ROOT" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null) || {
